program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Looking ahead with going to -- plans, goals and intentions for the oncology network next year -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Plans for Next Year
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 8 -- Plans for Next Year

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I read your plan for next year, and it is very good. You are going to expand the network and open the new center. I have one question: how are you going to attract patients from abroad? Are you going to invest in marketing? Let us talk next quarter. I am going to prepare some ideas. Thank you.

Good afternoon. Let me share our plan for next year. We are going to open the new Parque Global, and we are going to expand the oncology network in Latin America. Our main goal is to attract more patients from abroad. We are going to invest in research and launch new services soon. It is going to be a big year for the team. Thank you.
